changes: Improved ChatGPT and Claude connector setup by grouping main fields separately from advanced settings
Made Claude Code and Codex connections faster and more reliable.
Made Home source and agent buttons open their connection popups directly with compact setup action buttons.
Changed Home More to open the Apps catalog without leaving Home, focus memory destinations from the right column, and present setup details inside the Home card
Clarified that imports continue in the background after starting from the Home connection popup.
Made manual installation rows easier to expand in connection popups.
Omi can search the web again in chat and the floating bar — live answers for things like weather, news, and product details
Throttle Home status refreshes during repeated app activations
Let Home connection popups stop intercepting clicks as soon as they start dismissing
Fixed the Home More popup opening on a leftover category filter instead of the import and export sections
Fixed connector popups and sheets so Escape closes them and they behave as proper modals for VoiceOver and keyboard users
Kept the Apps category filter chip neutral instead of inheriting the macOS accent color
